variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16417 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16417 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16417 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P777868 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16417
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson RadialSeal™ Filters? Reliable, leak- resistant Radial Seal™ keeps filters in place – even under heavy vibration. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: FIL Filter HP 2584 A | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16417
variants.description: Genuine FIL Filter HP 2584 A. Easy to install and replace, the HP 2584 A is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
